task: The eval harness has an enum that classifies why a model run was invalid (provider_usage_limit, provider_auth_error, etc.). Add a NEW variant `ProviderRateLimit` with snake_case slug `"provider_rate_limit"`. Then update the bash agent-eval runner so that its Python `classify_run_validity` detects error messages containing the phrase "rate limit" (case-insensitive) and emits `provider_rate_limit` instead of `provider_usage_limit`. Both the Rust enum (with its slug-mapping helper) and the bash classifier need to be updated for the change to be functional.
